_comment: Regression floors for the real-environment Router Golden Test. A live 24-case run is NON-DETERMINISTIC: the model can flip on genuinely ambiguous inputs. The aggregate floors are a coarse collapse net with headroom for run-to-run noise, while exact incidents use dedicated regression cases and per-case mismatch reports. The test runs whenever the router LLM is configured and skips only when the required real environment is unavailable.
